en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. O LORD, in your strength the king rejoices, and in your salvation how greatly he exults!
zh: 耶和華啊！王因你的力量快樂， 因你的救恩大大歡呼。

en: You have given him his heart's desire and have not withheld the request of his lips. Selah
zh: 他心裡所願的，你賜給了他； 他嘴唇所求的，你沒有拒絕。

en: For you meet him with rich blessings; you set a crown of fine gold upon his head.
zh: 你以美福迎接他， 把精金的冠冕戴在他頭上。

en: He asked life of you; you gave it to him, length of days forever and ever.
zh: 他向你求壽，你就賜給他， 就是長久的日子，直到永遠。

en: His glory is great through your salvation; splendor and majesty you bestow on him.
zh: 他因你的救恩大有榮耀， 你又把尊榮和威嚴加給他。

en: For you make him most blessed forever; you make him glad with the joy of your presence.
zh: 你把永遠的福分賜給他， 又使他因與你同在的喜樂歡欣。

en: For the king trusts in the LORD, and through the steadfast love of the Most High he shall not be moved.
zh: 王倚靠耶和華， 靠著至高者的慈愛，他必不至動搖。

en: Your hand will find out all your enemies; your right hand will find out those who hate you.
zh: 你的手要搜出你所有的仇敵， 你的右手必搜出那些恨你的人。

en: You will make them as a blazing oven when you appear. The LORD will swallow them up in his wrath, and fire will consume them.
zh: 你出現的時候，就要使他們像熾熱的火爐； 耶和華必在他的震怒中吞滅他們，火必燒滅他們。

en: You will destroy their descendants from the earth, and their offspring from among the children of man.
zh: 你必從地上除滅他們的子孫， 從人間除滅他們的後裔。

en: Though they plan evil against you, though they devise mischief, they will not succeed.
zh: 雖然他們定下惡計害你， 他們所設的陰謀卻不能成功。

en: For you will put them to flight; you will aim at their faces with your bows.
zh: 你的箭扣上弦，對準他們的臉的時候， 他們必轉身而逃。

en: Be exalted, O LORD, in your strength! We will sing and praise your power.
zh: 耶和華啊！願你因自己的能力被尊崇， 好讓我們歌唱，頌讚你的大能。
